name: Aisyah R.
quote_id: Touchdown Mode menyelamatkan 48 jam pertama saya. Langsung dapat WiFi dan cafe kerja tanpa bingung.
quote_en: Touchdown Mode saved my first 48 hours. Found WiFi and a work cafe instantly, no confusion.

name: David K.
quote_id: Perimeter Map sangat akurat. Badge Nomad-Tested bikin saya percaya kecepatan WiFi-nya.
quote_en: The Perimeter Map is spot on. The Nomad-Tested badge made me trust the WiFi speeds.

name: Mei L.
quote_id: Artikel Kulon Progo-nya membantu saya menjelajah sela-sela waktu kerja. Kalibiru juara!
quote_en: The Kulon Progo articles helped me explore between work sessions. Kalibiru is a winner!

name: Raka P.
quote_id: Akhirnya ada panduan biaya yang jujur. Starter Kit-nya benar-benar to the point.
quote_en: Finally an honest cost guide. The Starter Kit is really to the point.

name: Hana S.
quote_id: Desainnya bersih dan cepat meski koneksi saya lambat. Mode gelapnya nyaman di mata.
quote_en: Clean and fast even on my slow connection. The dark mode is easy on the eyes.
